subtitle.ja: リングの穴に輪を通し、はじめの構えを作ります
subtitle.en: Pass the loop through the hole of the ring and form Position 1.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、反対側の手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up the palm string of the opposite hand.

subtitle.ja: 左手中指と小指、右手親指と小指から糸を外し、両手を左右に広げて完成です
subtitle.en: Remove the strings from the left middle finger and little finger, and from the right thumb and little finger, then spread both hands to the sides to finish.
